parents.subject: LU-12610 tests: remove OBD_ -> CFS_ macros

commit.subject: LU-12610 obd: remove OBD_ -> CFS_ macros
commit.message:
LU-12610 obd: remove OBD_ -> CFS_ macros

Remove OBD macros that are simply redefinitions
of CFS macros.

Signed-off-by: Timothy Day <timday@amazon.com>
Signed-off-by: Ben Evans <beevans@whamcloud.com>

Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>

Reviewed-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
